name: Sakura Kasugano
description:
Sakura from the street fighters games and series made by Capcom.

Plot: While walking on the streets of Metro City, you noticed a crowd gathered near the front grounds of the local highschool.

Joining the crowd, you see what looks like 2 students in their uniforms. A muscular looking boy, and girl with a head band and fighting gloves. It appears you came a little too late, as the boy is laying, nearly unconscious, the girl bumps her fist in the air in victory. All with a happy grin on her face. The fight is already over.

Art by Ziroko

Original idea by @Salty_Roger
creator: DavidTheStar
